name: Calculadora de Rejunte
seo_title: Calculadora de Rejunte – kg e Sacos Necessários
seo_description: Calcule quanto rejunte você precisa em kg e sacos. Insira as dimensões do azulejo, a largura da junta e a área total para obter a quantidade exata com cobertura por kg.
description: Calculadora 1110. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
steps: Joint length per m²: 2 × (30+30) ÷ (30×30) = 0.133 linear m per cm² → 1.33 m/m²
Volume per m²: 1.33 × 0.024 = 0.032 litres ≈ 0.058 kg/m² for 20 m² = 1.16 kg
Standard grout ≈ 1.7 kg/m² for 30×30 tile — total for 20 m² = 34 kg → 7 × 5 kg bags
mistakes: Using tile dimensions in metres instead of centimetres
Buying the same amount as tiles — grout quantity depends on joint width, not tile count
Forgetting that unsanded grout is used for joints under 3 mm, sanded for wider joints
formula_display: Grout per m² = 2 × (L+W) ÷ (L×W) × grout_width × tile_thickness × grout_density
